# Tennessee Information Protection Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Tennessee
Region: US-TN
Citation: Tennessee Information Protection Act
Authority: Tennessee General Assembly
Source URL: https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/BillInfo/Default.aspx?BillNumber=HB1181&GA=113
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: Tennessee Information Protection Act, TIPA, NIST privacy framework

## Summary
Tennessee privacy law with consumer rights, controller duties, and an affirmative-defense mechanism tied to privacy programs.

## Key compliance obligations
- Maintain privacy notices and rights processes.
- Apply opt-out and sensitive-data duties.
- Consider documented privacy-program controls.
